member.name: T:AstroMoonCalc.MoonIllumination
member.summary: Contains properties relating to the illumination of the moon

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.MoonIllumination.Fraction
member.summary: Illuminated fraction of the moon; varies from 0.0 (new moon) to 1.0 (full moon)

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.MoonIllumination.Phase
member.summary: Which of the eight principal and intermediate phases the moon is currently in

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.MoonIllumination.PhaseName
member.summary: Internationnal naming of the Phase

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.MoonIllumination.Angle
member.summary: Midpoint angle in radians of the illuminated limb of the moon reckoned eastward from the north point of the disk; the moon is waxing if the angle is negative, and waning if positive

member.name: T:AstroMoonCalc.MoonPhase
member.summary: The eight principal and intermediate phases of the Moon

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.MoonPhase.NewMoon
member.summary: Completely in Sun's shadow

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.MoonPhase.WaxingCrescent
member.summary: Disc between 0.1% and 49.9% lit, and increasing

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.MoonPhase.FirstQuarter
member.summary: Disc 50% lit

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.MoonPhase.WaxingGibbous
member.summary: Disc between 50.1% and 99.9% lit, and increasing

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.MoonPhase.FullMoon
member.summary: 100% illuminated

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.MoonPhase.WaningGibbous
member.summary: Disc between 99.9% and 50.1% lit, and decreasing

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.MoonPhase.LastQuarter
member.summary: 50% lit

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.MoonPhase.WaningCrescent
member.summary: Disc between 49.9% and 0.1% lit, and decreasing

member.name: T:AstroMoonCalc.MoonPhaseMapper
member.summary: Maps moon phases

member.name: M:AstroMoonCalc.MoonPhaseMapper.FromProgressThroughCycle(System.Double)
member.summary: Map moon phase based on how far the moon is through the lunar cycle
member.param: percentage value in the range 0 to 1, defining how far the moon is through the lunar cycle

member.name: T:AstroMoonCalc.MoonPosition
member.summary: Contains properties relating to the position of the moon

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.MoonPosition.Azimuth
member.summary: Lunar azimuth in radians

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.MoonPosition.Altitude
member.summary: Lunar altitude above the horizon in radians

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.MoonPosition.Distance
member.summary: Distance to moon in kilometers

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.MoonPosition.ParallacticAngle
member.summary: Parallactic angle of the moon in radians

member.name: T:AstroMoonCalc.MoonTimes
member.summary: Contains times for when the moon rises and sets each day

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.MoonTimes.Rise
member.summary: Time of moon rise

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.MoonTimes.Set
member.summary: Time of moon set

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.MoonTimes.AlwaysUp
member.summary: True if the moon never rises/sets and is always above the horizon during the day

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.MoonTimes.AlwaysDown
member.summary: True if the moon is always below the horizon

member.name: T:AstroMoonCalc.SunPosition
member.summary: Contains properties relating to the position of the Sun

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.SunPosition.Azimuth
member.summary: Solar azimuth in radians (direction along the horizon, measured from south to west), e.g. 0 is south and Math.PI * 3/4 is northwest

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.SunPosition.Altitude
member.summary: Solar altitude above the horizon in radians, e.g. 0 at the horizon and PI/2 at the zenith (straight over your head)

member.name: T:AstroMoonCalc.SunTimes
member.summary: Contains times for each of the events of the sun on a given day

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.SunTimes.Sunrise
member.summary: sunrise (top edge of the sun appears on the horizon)

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.SunTimes.SunriseEnd
member.summary: sunrise ends (bottom edge of the sun touches the horizon)

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.SunTimes.GoldenHourEnd
member.summary: morning golden hour (soft light, best time for photography) ends

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.SunTimes.SolarNoon
member.summary: solar noon (sun is in the highest position)

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.SunTimes.GoldenHour
member.summary: evening golden hour starts

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.SunTimes.SunsetStart
member.summary: sunset starts (bottom edge of the sun touches the horizon)

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.SunTimes.Sunset
member.summary: sunset (sun disappears below the horizon, evening civil twilight starts)

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.SunTimes.Dusk
member.summary: dusk (evening nautical twilight starts)

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.SunTimes.NauticalDusk
member.summary: nautical dusk (evening astronomical twilight starts)

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.SunTimes.Night
member.summary: night starts (dark enough for astronomical observations)

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.SunTimes.Nadir
member.summary: nadir (darkest moment of the night, sun is in the lowest position)

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.SunTimes.NightEnd
member.summary: night ends (morning astronomical twilight starts)

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.SunTimes.NauticalDawn
member.summary: nautical dawn (morning nautical twilight starts)

member.name: F:AstroMoonCalc.SunTimes.Dawn
member.summary: dawn (morning nautical twilight ends, morning civil twilight starts)

member.name: T:AstroMoonCalc.MoonCalc
member.summary: Calculate lunar movement

member.name: M:AstroMoonCalc.MoonCalc.GetMoonPosition(System.DateTime,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary:
Calculates lunar position for a given location and point in time
based on http://aa.quae.nl/en/reken/hemelpositie.html formulas

member.name: M:AstroMoonCalc.MoonCalc.GetMoonIllumination(System.DateTime)
member.summary: calculations for illumination parameters of the moon, based on http://idlastro.gsfc.nasa.gov/ftp/pro/astro/mphase.pro formulas and Chapter 48 of "Astronomical Algorithms" 2nd edition by Jean Meeus (Willmann-Bell, Richmond) 1998.
member.param: time and date to calculate for

member.name: M:AstroMoonCalc.MoonCalc.GetMoonDayThroughCycle(System.DateTime)
member.summary: calculations for illumination parameters of the moon, based on http://idlastro.gsfc.nasa.gov/ftp/pro/astro/mphase.pro formulas and Chapter 48 of "Astronomical Algorithms" 2nd edition by Jean Meeus (Willmann-Bell, Richmond) 1998.
member.param: time and date to calculate for

member.name: M:AstroMoonCalc.MoonCalc.GetMoonTimes(System.DateTime,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Calculations for moon rise/set times are based on http://www.stargazing.net/kepler/moonrise.html

member.name: T:AstroMoonCalc.Properties.Resource
member.summary: Une classe de ressource fortement typée destinée, entre autres, à la consultation des chaînes localisées.

member.name: P:AstroMoonCalc.Properties.Resource.ResourceManager
member.summary: Retourne l'instance ResourceManager mise en cache utilisée par cette classe.

member.name: P:AstroMoonCalc.Properties.Resource.Culture
member.summary: Remplace la propriété CurrentUICulture du thread actuel pour toutes les recherches de ressources à l'aide de cette classe de ressource fortement typée.

member.name: P:AstroMoonCalc.Properties.Resource.FirstQuarter
member.summary: Recherche une chaîne localisée semblable à Premier Quartier.

member.name: P:AstroMoonCalc.Properties.Resource.FullMoon
member.summary: Recherche une chaîne localisée semblable à Pleine Lune.

member.name: P:AstroMoonCalc.Properties.Resource.LastQuarter
member.summary: Recherche une chaîne localisée semblable à Dernier Quartier.

member.name: P:AstroMoonCalc.Properties.Resource.NewMoon
member.summary: Recherche une chaîne localisée semblable à Nouvelle Lune.

member.name: P:AstroMoonCalc.Properties.Resource.WaningCrescent
member.summary: Recherche une chaîne localisée semblable à Dernier Croissant.

member.name: P:AstroMoonCalc.Properties.Resource.WaningGibbous
member.summary: Recherche une chaîne localisée semblable à Gibbeuse décroissante.

member.name: P:AstroMoonCalc.Properties.Resource.WaxingCrescent
member.summary: Recherche une chaîne localisée semblable à Premier Croissant.

member.name: P:AstroMoonCalc.Properties.Resource.WaxingGibbous
member.summary: Recherche une chaîne localisée semblable à Gibbeuse croissante.

member.name: T:AstroMoonCalc.SunCalc
member.summary: Calculate Sun movement

member.name: M:AstroMoonCalc.SunCalc.GetPosition(System.DateTime,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Calculates solar position for a given location and point in time

member.name: M:AstroMoonCalc.SunCalc.GetTimes(System.DateTime,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Calculates sun times for a given date, latitude/longitude, and, optionally, the observer height (in meters) relative to the horizon
member.param: observer height relative to the horizon in metres (optional)
